# Update fast-copy to v3

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-07 -->

## Status

Accepted

## Context

`fast-copy` v3 was released with potential breaking changes. The library was pinned to v2.x after a previous v3 bump caused issues (commit `df259c7`, "fix: lock fast-copy dependency [NONE]" and `761aae3` reverting the automatic Dependabot bump).

A Jira ticket (DX-424) tracked the need to update fast-copy properly.

Commit `1913830` (2025-10-01): "chore(deps): update fast-copy to v3"

## Decision

Update `fast-copy` from v2.x to v3.0.2 after verifying compatibility with the library's usage patterns. The v3 API is compatible for the `copy(obj)` default export usage this library relies on.

## Consequences

- Brings in performance improvements from fast-copy v3
- Resolved the outstanding DX-424 ticket
- Future fast-copy major bumps should be tested against the full test suite before merging
